title: mine_artifact
description: Summary of an intent/idea-mining run over prepared Claude/Codex transcript sources, read from emitted reports (never invented).

brief_path.description: Path to the emitted BRIEF.md for this job.

source_counts.description: Per-source trace/intent counts and unavailable metrics, keyed by source id.

tool_gaps.description: Missing tooling/signals observed during mining, such as Codex cost extraction.

intent_count_display.description: Human-facing total intent count, formatted without decimal suffixes.

conversation_count_display.description: Human-facing total conversations reviewed across all harnesses.

message_count_display.description: Human-facing total messages reviewed across all harnesses.

token_count_display.description: Human-facing token total; explicitly mark unavailable harnesses instead of estimating.

claude_breakdown_display.description: Compact Claude Code row for the MINE screen: conversations, messages, tokens, intents.

codex_breakdown_display.description: Compact Codex row for the MINE screen: conversations, messages, tokens/unavailable, intents.

total_reviewed_display.description: Compact total row for the MINE screen: conversations, messages, known tokens, intents.

green_split_display.description: Compact explanation of the green deterministic/defaultable split.

yellow_split_display.description: Compact explanation of the yellow agent-gated split.

red_split_display.description: Compact explanation of the red irreducible judgment split.

source_breakdown_markdown.description: Compact markdown table breaking down conversations, messages, tokens, and intents per harness.

summary_markdown.description: Human-readable summary of the run delivered to the transport.
